name: Dangun Wanggeom
role: Legendary founder of Gojoseon (2333 BCE)
quote: The people must have proper sounds to express their thoughts freely.

name: King Sejong the Great
role: Fourth Joseon monarch (r. 1418-1450); creator of Hangul alphabet
quote: Though the sounds of our country differ from Chinese, the ignorant common people have no way to express themselves. Feeling sorry for them, I have newly devised twenty-eight letters.

name: Admiral Yi Sun-sin
role: Joseon naval commander; hero of the Imjin War (1592-1598)
quote: My life and death are matters of fortune. However, I must fight on.

name: Empress Myeongseong (Queen Min)
role: Joseon Queen and Empress consort; murdered by Japanese agents 1895
quote: I will fight them until my last breath to defend this nation's sovereignty.

name: Ahn Jung-geun
role: Korean independence activist; assassinated Ito Hirobumi in Harbin, 1909
quote: I shot him because he is the one who disturbs the peace of the Far East and the harmony between Korea and Japan.

name: Syngman Rhee
role: First President of the Republic of Korea (1948-1960)
quote: Korea is one, its people one; there can be no division, no compromise with the communists who have enslaved our countrymen.

name: Kim Il-sung
role: DPRK founder and leader (1948-1994); launched Korean War in 1950
quote: The Korean people are a gifted people, capable of building independently a rich and powerful state of their own.

name: Park Chung-hee
role: Military ruler and President of South Korea (1961-1979)
quote: We can do it. We must do it. Whatever the cost, Korea will achieve economic self-sufficiency in my lifetime.

name: Chun Doo-hwan
role: Military dictator and President (1980-1988); ordered Gwangju crackdown
quote: National security requires strong leadership. Those who threaten stability will face the full force of the state.

name: Kim Dae-jung
role: Opposition leader, President (1998-2003); Nobel Peace Prize 2000 for Sunshine Policy
quote: I have lived under constant threat of death, in prison, in exile and under house arrest, but today I am here as President of a democratic Republic of Korea.

name: Roh Tae-woo
role: President (1988-1993); issued June 29 Democratic Declaration; later convicted of corruption
quote: I accept the people's demand for direct elections. The June 29 Declaration is my personal commitment to democracy.

name: Kim Young-sam
role: First civilian President (1993-1998); launched anti-corruption reforms; presided over IMF crisis
quote: A government that steals one chopstick is a government that steals everything. Corruption must end.

name: General Douglas MacArthur
role: UN Command Supreme Commander during Korean War (1950-1951); architect of Inchon landing
quote: We shall land at Inchon and I shall crush them. We must shoot for the Moon. If we miss, we shall still hit a star.

name: Roh Moo-hyun
role: President (2003-2008); second inter-Korean summit 2007; later died by suicide amid corruption investigation
quote: Democracy is the political system of the people — not of those who claim to represent the people, but of the people themselves.

name: Park Geun-hye
role: First female President (2013-2017); daughter of Park Chung-hee; impeached and removed
quote: South Korea will pursue trust-based diplomacy — building genuine trust with North Korea and all neighbors before advancing inter-Korean relations.

name: Moon Jae-in
role: President (2017-2022); three inter-Korean summits; Trump-Kim diplomacy facilitator
quote: Peace on the Korean peninsula is not a dream. It is an achievable goal, and we will not rest until we achieve it.

name: Kim Jong-un
role: DPRK Supreme Leader (2011-present); oversaw nuclear weapons program expansion
quote: Our nuclear forces are the absolute safeguard that defends the sovereignty of the Korean nation and the right to existence.

name: Yoon Suk Yeol
role: President (2022-2025); declared martial law December 3, 2024; impeached and removed April 4, 2025
quote: I declare martial law to protect free Republic of Korea from anti-state forces that are paralyzing the state through legislative dictatorship.

name: Han Duck-soo
role: Acting President of South Korea (December 2024 – June 2025) following Yoon Suk Yeol's impeachment suspension
quote: I will ensure the stability of the government and faithful execution of state affairs during this period of constitutional transition.

name: Lee Jae-myung
role: Leader of Democratic Party; President of South Korea (elected June 2025)
quote: The era of democracy has won. We will rebuild trust with the people, create a fair economy, and pursue peace on the Korean peninsula.
